headline.purpose: Compact product headings and current-focus text.

body.purpose: Dense but readable task and settings copy.

label.purpose: Files, shortcuts, event kinds, timestamps, model names, and scan metadata.

motion.name: quick-feedback
motion.purpose: Hover, focus, toast, and overlay feedback only.

components.name: Neutral Button
components.description: Default HUD and settings action button.
components.css: .ds-button-neutral { border: 1px solid rgba(120,135,150,0.18); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.055); color: #e8edf2; border-radius: 7px; padding: 10px 14px; font: 13px/1.35 Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; } .ds-button-neutral:hover { border-color: rgba(138,180,255,0.42); color: #58a6ff; }

components.name: Primary Settings Button
components.description: Filled button for Analyze and Save changes.
components.css: .ds-button-primary { border: 1px solid rgba(88,166,255,0.62); background: linear-gradient(180deg, #2f7fdc, #1f63b7); color: #fff; border-radius: 7px; padding: 11px 16px; font: 800 13px/1.35 Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 10px 24px -16px rgba(88,166,255,0.9); }

components.name: Signal Cell
components.description: One Workspace Signals metric: label, value, note.
components.html:
Edits / min
7
change events only
components.css: .ds-signal { background: #10181d; color: #e8edf2; border: 1px solid rgba(120,135,150,0.18); border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 14px; font-family: Inter, Segoe UI, sans-serif; } .ds-signal-label { color: #78828d; font: 500 10px/1.35 JetBrains Mono, Consolas, monospace; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; margin-bottom: 5px; } .ds-signal-value { font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.05; font-weight: 750; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .ds-signal-note { margin-top: 5px; color: #aeb8c2; font: 10px/1.35 JetBrains Mono, Consolas, monospace; }

narrative.overview: RepoLog is a calm, high-density instrument panel for returning to coding work. It should feel local, direct, and task-first: a place to inspect the repo's current truth, not a place to perform productivity.
keyCharacteristics: Dense first viewport focused on Objective, Current Focus, Workspace Signals, Now, Next, Recent Activity, Agent Docs, and Prompt Palette.
Flat panels with borders instead of decorative shadows.
Blue accent used for selected state, primary action, focus, and links only.
Mono text for metadata, paths, shortcut hints, event kinds, and timestamps.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Blue is the only general accent. Green, amber, and red are reserved for semantic state.

rules.name: The Flat HUD Rule
rules.body: Regular HUD panels do not use drop shadows. They use a 1px border, 7-8px radius, and tonal surface changes.

rules.name: The Metadata Mono Rule
rules.body: Mono type means machine or workflow context: file paths, docs, shortcuts, event kinds, model names, and timestamps.

dos: Do make the first viewport answer what the user was doing, why it matters, what changed, and what to do next.
Do use Signal Blue (#58a6ff) sparingly for active state, links, focus, and primary affordances.
Do test the HUD at common laptop and desktop resolutions before claiming it is polished.
donts: Don't show fake agent liveness such as Codex idle unless a real integration supports that claim.
Don't add gamification: no XP, streaks, timers, pomodoros, mascots, creature moods, or motivational nudges.
Don't use panicking copy, LLM nudge bubbles, or emotional activity states.
Don't rely on horizontal scrolling for the main HUD.
